footer_desc: The ultimate grip to dominate the court. Maximum hold, zero excuses.
features_main_text: It is the ultimate ally for players seeking total control over their racket, even in highly demanding conditions. Its advanced formula effectively combats sweat and moisture, creating optimal friction that ensures a firm and stable grip throughout the game.
feature_1_desc: Improves adherence between the hand and the racket, optimizing every movement.
feature_2_desc: Advanced anti-slip: prevents sweat from affecting your performance, ensuring a solid grip even in humid climates.
feature_3_desc: Quick and simple application: just spray and enjoy an instant, long-lasting grip.
feature_4_desc: Formula tested by professionals to withstand the most demanding matches without leaving sticky residue.
hiw_step1_desc: Ensure the grip surface of your racket is completely clean and dry before applying the spray.
hiw_step2_desc: Hold the bottle about 20 cm away from the racket and apply an even coat directly over the entire grip.
hiw_step3_desc: Let the spray dry for a couple of minutes. You're ready to hit the court and dominate the game!
faq_q1: How long does the spray effect last?
faq_a1: The effect is designed to last a full padel match (approximately 2 hours). Depending on your sweating level and ambient humidity, you might need a quick touch-up between sets.
faq_q2: Is it safe for skin and the racket?
faq_a2: Absolutely! Our formula is non-toxic, skin-friendly, and specifically designed not to damage your overgrip materials or leave stains.
faq_q3: Does it leave a sticky residue?
faq_a3: No. Unlike traditional resins, ACE PRO GRIP dries in seconds leaving a clean friction layer. Your hands won't feel sticky after the match.
faq_a4: A standard bottle lasts for about 40-50 matches, depending on the amount applied each time. A little goes a long way!
contact_page_subtitle: Do you have questions about ACE PRO GRIP, want to become a distributor, or just want to say hi? Fill out the form and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.
form_success: Message sent successfully! We will get back to you soon.
form_error: There was an error sending the message. Please try again.
